sentence: 违规停车将依法受到处罚。
pinyin: Wéiguī tíngchē jiāng yī fǎ shòudào chǔfá.
english: Illegal parking will be penalized according to the law.

sentence: 这项政策产生了明显的蝴蝶效应。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng zhèngcè chǎnshēng le míngxiǎn de húdié xiàoyìng.
english: This policy produced an obvious butterfly effect.

sentence: 老师经常在课上和学生互动。
pinyin: Lǎoshī jīngcháng zài kè shang hé xuésheng hù dòng.
english: The teacher often interacts with students during class.

meaning: (coll.) to take (sth) as …; to treat as …; to assume; to act as if …;
sentence: 他说的话太难听了，我只当没听见。
pinyin: Tā shuō de huà tài nán tīng le, wǒ zhǐ dāng méi tīng jiàn.
english: What he said was so harsh that I just treated it as if I hadn't heard it.

meaning: 1. bilateral; 2. both shores; 3. both sides; 4. both coasts; 5. Taiwan
sentence: 两岸之间的交流越来越频繁。
pinyin: Liǎng àn zhī jiān de jiāoliú yuèlái yuè pínfán.
english: Exchanges between the two sides of the strait have become more and more frequent.

sentence: 节日期间街头到处都是人。
pinyin: Jiérì qījiān jiētóu dàochù dōu shì rén.
english: During the holiday, the streets were packed with people everywhere.

sentence: 我们要学会尊重他者的感受。
pinyin: Wǒmen yào xuéhuì zūnzhòng tāzhě de gǎnshòu.
english: We need to learn to respect the feelings of others.

sentence: 计划经济体制下，国家控制生产。
pinyin: Jìhuà jīngjì tǐzhì xià, guójiā kòngzhì shēngchǎn.
english: Under a planned economy system, the state controls production.

meaning: 1. early period; 2. early phase; 3. early stage
sentence: 疾病在早期发现更容易治疗。
pinyin: Jíbìng zài zǎoqī fāxiàn gèng róngyì zhìliáo.
english: Diseases detected at an early stage are easier to treat.

sentence: 最近菜价上涨了不少。
pinyin: Zuìjìn càijià shàng zhǎng le bù shǎo.
english: Vegetable prices have risen quite a bit recently.

sentence: 你知道现在是几月份吗？
pinyin: Nǐ zhī dào xiàn zài shì jǐ yuè fèn ma?
english: Do you know what month it is now?

meaning: (used to stress that sth did not turn out as one might have expected)
sentence: 他看起来很忙，实际上并未做什么。
pinyin: Tā kàn qǐ lái hěn máng, shí jì shàng bìng wèi zuò shén me.
english: He looked very busy, but actually hadn't done much at all.

sentence: 市政府决定兴建一座新的图书馆。
pinyin: Shì zhèngfǔ juédìng xīngjiàn yī zuò xīn de túshūguǎn.
english: The city government decided to build a new library.

sentence: 出国前她去银行换了一些外汇。
pinyin: Chū guó qián tā qù yín háng huàn le yī xiē wài huì.
english: Before going abroad, she went to the bank to exchange some foreign currency.

sentence: 周末我们去农场体验采摘草莓。
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒmen qù nóngchǎng tǐyàn cǎizhāi cǎoméi.
english: On the weekend we went to the farm to experience strawberry picking.

sentence: 两个人结婚后感情很好，经常爱爱。
pinyin: Liǎng gè rén jié hūn hòu gǎn qíng hěn hǎo, jīng cháng ài ài.
english: The two of them have a great relationship after getting married and are intimate often.

meaning: 1. completely; 2. totally; 3. total; 4. entire; 5. overall; 6. populat
sentence: 总体来说，这次旅行还是很顺利的。
pinyin: Zǒngtǐ lái shuō, zhè cì lǚxíng háishì hěn shùnlì de.
english: Overall, this trip went pretty smoothly.

sentence: 他不喜欢社交，周末宁愿待在家里。
pinyin: Tā bù xǐhuān shèjiāo, zhōumò nìngyuàn dāi zài jiālǐ.
english: He doesn't like socializing and would rather stay home on weekends.

sentence: 这套公寓是一位知名设计师设计的。
pinyin: Zhè tào gōngyù shì yī wèi zhīmíng shè jì shī shèjì de.
english: This apartment was designed by a well-known designer.

sentence: 大选结果明天会公布。
pinyin: Dàxuǎn jiéguǒ míngtiān huì gōngbù.
english: The general election results will be announced tomorrow.

sentence: 近年来，网购越来越受到大家的欢迎。
pinyin: Jìn nián lái, wǎng gòu yuè lái yuè shòu dào dà jiā de huān yíng.
english: Online shopping has become increasingly popular in recent years.

meaning: 1. optimization; 2. to optimize; 3. to make superior
sentence: 我们需要优化一下这个App的界面。
pinyin: Wǒmen xūyào yōu huà yīxià zhège App de jièmiàn.
english: We need to optimize the interface of this app a bit.

sentence: 此事已经解决，请放心。
pinyin: Cǐ shì yǐjīng jiějué, qǐng fàngxīn.
english: This matter has already been resolved, so please don't worry.

meaning: 1. term of office; 2. CL:屆|届[jiè]; 3. tenure (entire period in office)
sentence: 校长的任期是四年。
pinyin: Xiàozhǎng de rènqī shì sì nián.
english: The principal's term of office is four years.

sentence: 她老家在中国中部的一个小城市。
pinyin: Tā lǎojiā zài Zhōngguó zhōng bù de yī gè xiǎo chéngshì.
english: Her hometown is a small city in central China.

sentence: 你的账号密码不对，请重新输入。
pinyin: Nǐ de zhàng hào mìmǎ bù duì, qǐng chóngxīn shūrù.
english: Your account password is incorrect, please enter it again.

sentence: 这次采购的总额超过了预算。
pinyin: Zhè cì cǎigòu de zǒng é chāoguòle yùsuàn.
english: The total amount of this purchase exceeded the budget.

sentence: 她参加了全国烹饪大赛。
pinyin: Tā cānjiā le quánguó pēngrèn dàsài.
english: She entered the national cooking contest.

sentence: 这个地区缺乏年轻劳动力，发展受限。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū quēfá niánqīng láodònglì, fāzhǎn shòuxiàn.
english: This region lacks young labor, which limits its development.

sentence: 他年初定了一个减肥的目标。
pinyin: Tā niánchū dìngle yī gè jiǎnféi de mùbiāo.
english: At the beginning of the year, he set a goal to lose weight.

sentence: 清末各地的会党活动非常频繁。
pinyin: Qīng mò gè dì de huì dǎng huó dòng fēi cháng pín fán.
english: Anti-Qing secret society activities were very frequent across the country in the late Qing dynasty.

meaning: lacking three key attributes (or at least one of them)
sentence: 网上那些三无产品质量很难保证。
pinyin: Wǎng shàng nà xiē sān wú chǎn pǐn zhì liàng hěn nán bǎo zhèng.
english: The quality of those products sold online that lack key certifications is hard to guarantee.

sentence: 年轻人在大城市买住房越来越难。
pinyin: Niánqīngrén zài dà chéngshì mǎi zhù fáng yuè lái yuè nán.
english: It's getting harder and harder for young people to buy housing in big cities.

sentence: 电影后期制作花了将近半年时间。
pinyin: Diànyǐng hòuqī zhìzuò huā le jiāngjìn bàn nián shíjiān.
english: Post-production on the film took nearly half a year.

sentence: 救援直升机把伤者送到了医院。
pinyin: Jiùyuán zhíshēngjī bǎ shāngzhě sòng dào le yīyuàn.
english: A rescue helicopter airlifted the injured person to the hospital.

sentence: 有人匿名举报了那家餐厅的卫生问题。
pinyin: Yǒu rén nìmíng jǔbào le nà jiā cāntīng de wèishēng wèntí.
english: Someone anonymously reported the hygiene problems at that restaurant.

sentence: 这个城市的人均收入在全国排名靠前。
pinyin: Zhège chéngshì de rén jūn shōurù zài quánguó páimíng kào qián.
english: This city's per capita income ranks near the top nationally.

meaning: 1. album; 2. record (music); 3. special collection of printed or broad
sentence: 她的新专辑上线两天就卖出了百万张。
pinyin: Tā de xīn zhuān jí shàngxiàn liǎng tiān jiù màichū le bǎiwàn zhāng.
english: Her new album sold a million copies within two days of its release.

sentence: 他毕业后进入传媒行业工作。
pinyin: Tā bìyè hòu jìnrù chuán méi hángyè gōngzuò.
english: After graduating he went to work in the media industry.

meaning: rule of law; to rule by law
sentence: 一个社会要稳定发展，离不开法治。
pinyin: Yī gè shè huì yào wěn dìng fā zhǎn, lí bù kāi fǎ zhì.
english: For a society to develop stably, it cannot do without rule of law.

sentence: 志愿者去山区支教了三个月。
pinyin: Zhìyuànzhě qù shānqū zhī jiāo le sān gè yuè.
english: The volunteer went to a mountain area to teach for three months.

sentence: 手机屏幕太脏，图像看起来很模糊。
pinyin: Shǒujī píngmù tài zāng, túxiàng kàn qǐlái hěn móhu.
english: The phone screen is too dirty and the image looks very blurry.

meaning: 1. counterpoint (in music etc); 2. to align; 3. alignment
sentence: 音乐老师讲解了对位的基本技法。
pinyin: Yīnyuè lǎoshī jiǎngjiě le duìwèi de jīběn jìfǎ.
english: The music teacher explained the basic techniques of counterpoint.

sentence: 密码要求至少包含一个小写字母。
pinyin: Mì mǎ yāo qiú zhì shǎo bāo hán yī gè xiǎo xiě zì mǔ.
english: The password must contain at least one lowercase letter.

sentence: 这篇文章对这个问题有详细的论述。
pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng duì zhège wèntí yǒu xiángxì de lùn shù.
english: This article contains a detailed discussion of this issue.

meaning: 1. to enroll new students; 2. to get students
sentence: 学校每年秋季招生。
pinyin: Xuéxiào měinián qiūjì zhāoshēng.
english: The school enrolls new students every fall.

meaning: 1. to turn around in one's hands; 2. to play with; 3. to fiddle w
sentence: 他喜欢把玩各种古董小物件。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān bǎwán gè zhǒng gǔdǒng xiǎo wùjiàn.
english: He enjoys fiddling with all kinds of small antique items.

meaning: routine; everyday business; daily operation (of a company)
sentence: 她负责公司的常务工作，每天都很忙。
pinyin: Tā fù zé gōng sī de cháng wù gōng zuò, měi tiān dōu hěn máng.
english: She handles the company's day-to-day operations and is busy every day.

meaning: 1. to imagine; 2. to make up; 3. fictitious; 4. theoretical; 5. hypoth
sentence: 他喜欢在虚拟世界里探索。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān zài xūnǐ shìjiè lǐ tànsuǒ.
english: He enjoys exploring in virtual worlds.

sentence: 汽车燃料用完了，要去加油。
pinyin: Qìchē ránliào yòng wán le, yào qù jiāyóu.
english: The car has run out of fuel — we need to fill up.
